steps.title: Identify the verb position and subject
steps.content: The second independent clause (joined by 'and') has the plural subject “its theoretical linguistic properties” with the blank in the verb position.

steps.title: Select the finite verb matching the subject
steps.content:
An independent clause's main verb must agree with its subject. Reflect is the finite verb matching the plural subject “properties.” The other options either use participles that cannot function as main verbs, or introduce a relative clause without providing the main verb an independent clause requires.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
